segments.template: {{ if not (env "VIRTUAL_ENV") }} <#b9c0c8>{{ .HEAD }}</>{{ if gt .Ahead 0 }} <#9f7aea>↑{{ .Ahead }}</>{{ end }}{{ if gt .Behind 0 }} <#5f87d7>↓{{ .Behind }}</>{{ end }}{{ if .Working.Changed }} <#ffcb6b> {{ .Working.String }}</>{{ end }}{{ if and (or (gt .Ahead 0) (gt .Behind 0) (.Working.Changed)) (or (.Staging.Changed) (gt .StashCount 0)) }} <#6b7280>|</>{{ end }}{{ if .Staging.Changed }} <#7ee787> {{ .Staging.String }}</>{{ end }}{{ if and (.Staging.Changed) (gt .StashCount 0) }} <#6b7280>|</>{{ end }}{{ if gt .StashCount 0 }} <#61afef> {{ .StashCount }}</>{{ end }} {{ end }}
